description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing data_hash (a real-format 64-char lowercase hex SHA-256 digest) and fixes seed from the string '42' to the integer 42. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: seed/env/data_hash/code_version are all required, additionalProperties is false, data_hash must match a 64-char lowercase hex pattern, seed must be an integer. Read output.json: data_hash is missing entirely and seed is the string '42', not the integer 42. Adding data_hash and fixing seed to the integer 42.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
